title: The Train Ride Home
content: After a weekend conference, Sophie boarded the evening train feeling exhausted. The only available seat was beside Alex, another attendee she had briefly met earlier that day. During the long journey, they talked about work, travel, and the books they enjoyed reading. As the countryside passed by outside the window, the conversation became surprisingly personal. By the time the train reached their city, neither wanted the trip to end. Before leaving the station, they exchanged phone numbers and promised to continue the conversation somewhere that was not moving along railway tracks.
